title: L&D Director — Innovation, Research, Certification, Emerging Practices
mission: Own enterprise learning strategy for innovation, applied research, certification programs, and emerging practices across the entire organization. Monitor technology trends, evaluate new methodologies, maintain certification intelligence, ensure enterprise-wide innovation capability, and keep the L&D system itself evolving.
business_value: Ensures the organization stays ahead of industry evolution. Innovation learning drives competitive advantage. Certification intelligence ensures talent investment ROI. Emerging practices prevent obsolescence. L&D self-improvement ensures the learning system itself remains world-class.

reporting_line.direct_reports: ELO-T2 Domain Leads: Innovation, Applied Research, Certification Intelligence, Emerging Practices, L&D System Evolution
reporting_line.functional_peers: ELO-T1 Directors (Engineering, Business Systems, Product/Design, Executive/PMO)

decision_rights: Set certification program strategy and priorities
Set research agenda for learning improvement
approval_rights: New Tier 3 feeder agent creation for innovation domains

escalation_paths.same_day: Peer L&D Directors for cross-domain coordination
escalation_paths.weekly: Enterprise L&D Council for portfolio review

artifacts_owned: Quarterly Learning ROI Report — Innovation & Research
kpis: Emerging technology adoption speed (target: <90 days from discovery to learning)
success_metrics: All innovation/research agents connected to ELO within 24 hours
Technology radar updated monthly with actionable items
Certification roadmaps current for all agents
New technologies discovered and added to learning within 7 days
Innovation learning driving measurable product improvements
governance_responsibilities: Review Tier 2 domain lead performance weekly
Escalate systemic innovation gaps to Founder
Approve new learning domain additions across enterprise
